assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets options.KeyManagement.SigningAlgorithms to an array containing a SigningAlgorithmOptions for RsaSha256 with UseX509Certificate = true
assertions.rationale: Line 17 creates SigningAlgorithmOptions(SecurityAlgorithms.RsaSha256) but does NOT set UseX509Certificate = true.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs includes a SigningAlgorithmOptions for EcdsaSha256 (ES256) in the SigningAlgorithms array
Program.cs defines a client with ClientId 'mobile-app' that has AllowedIdentityTokenSigningAlgorithms containing EcdsaSha256 or 'ES256'
assertions.rationale: Lines 40-45 define mobile-app with AllowedIdentityTokenSigningAlgorithms = { SecurityAlgorithms.EcdsaSha256 }.

assertions.assertion: The RS256 algorithm entry appears before ES256 in the SigningAlgorithms array to be the default
assertions.rationale: RS256 (line 17) appears before ES256 (line 18) in the array.
